channel.title: How To Split Bills on Econumo
channel.description: Recent content in How To Split Bills on Econumo

item.title: How to Split Bills Without the Headache in 2026
item.description: When you first move in with someone, splitting bills 50/50 seems like the obvious, no-fuss solution. But as many of us have learned the hard way, what’s easy isn't always what's fair. This simple approach often ignores the messy, real-life differences in income, lifestyle, and even how much hot water someone uses. Before you know it, that simple 50/50 split can become a major source of household tension. Why 50/50
